name: Partially my fault in machinery accident at work in Cottonwood Heights, still get comp?

mainEntity.name: Partially my fault in machinery accident at work in Cottonwood Heights, still get comp?

acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, workers' comp is no-fault in Utah—benefits regardless of your fault unless intoxication proven. Third-party fault separate.[9] Key factors: employer defense rare, safety training irrelevant for comp. File standard claim, pursue equipment maker if defective; full medical/wages. Fault doesn't bar basics.
